violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was observed to be inaccessible due to the ice machine and refrigerator on both sides of it. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

Spray bottles were stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items in the kitchen and on the sides of the hand sinks. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine must be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent the contamination of ice. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2024

The floors (and stand for ice machine) in the back prep area are constructed of concrete which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors and walls must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Per PIC, a maintenance request has been made for the floors to be repaired/serviced/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

The display case cooler located in the front prep area was not in good repair. The ambient of the cooler was observed at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Ambient temperature of refrigerator units must be 41 or below. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The ice well in the bar area was observed with an air-break. The ice well is lacking a proper backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

The following was observed: 1) The floors (and stand for ice machine) in the back prep area are constructed of concrete which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. 2) The walls of the mop sink area is constructed of dry wall. The materials for indoor floors and walls must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024
